title: SEO与算法优化 SEO & Algorithm Optimization
description: Maximize discoverability across platforms through systematic optimization

tasks.text: Research top 50 xiangqi search keywords (YouTube + Bilibili + Douyin)
Create title formula templates: curiosity + benefit, under 60 chars
Design 3 thumbnail styles, A/B test on YouTube
Optimize first 3 seconds of every video for maximum hook
Bilibili: ensure first 8 characters of title are compelling
Track traffic sources weekly: search vs suggestions vs Shorts
Install vidIQ or TubeBuddy for YouTube keyword research
